message:
fix(core): handle ambiguity/gaps in CGR + logos

- analysis/cgr: reset the chaos-game chain on non-ACGT (e.g. N) and count transient removal by valid steps so k-mers do not bridge across ambiguity.
- analysis/kmer-frequencies: treat non-ASCII characters as invalid and guard against undefined CHAR_MAP entries.
- analysis/sequence-logo: compute Schneider error correction using the per-column valid sample count (ignoring gaps/N), and update the unit test threshold accordingly.
